text:
I'm very sorry for the long, long delay..... Now I have a patch and I
have tested it.

It works, but I'm not sure if it uses PAM or not.
I am able to login as before, and I am able to reboot in the login screen.

Here is the patch:

http://www.henryhu.net/slim-1.3.2_3.patch

Cheers,
